layout.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Mode B (Control Room): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6
layout.cards: bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6

components.tables: Shadcn Table, no external card wrapper needed if full width. Align numeric/currency columns to right.
components.modals: Shadcn Dialog for Add/Edit forms, max-w-xl.
components.dropdowns: Shadcn DropdownMenu for row actions (Edit, Delete, Mark as Paid).

pages.login: Minimalist layout. Left half: auth container, Right half: background image.
pages.dashboard: Top row: Total Receivables (col-span-4). Second row: 4 metrics for Overdue amounts (1-15 days, 16-30 days, 31-45 days, 45+ days).
pages.customers: CRUD Table. Columns: Name, Company, Email, Phone, Receivables. Actions: Add/Edit/Delete.
pages.items: CRUD Table. Columns: Name, Rate. Actions: Add/Edit/Delete.
pages.invoices: CRUD Table. Columns: Date, Number, Customer, Status, Due Date, Amount, Balance. Statuses: Draft, Sent, Overdue, Paid.
pages.approval_queue: List/Table. Columns: Client, Amount, Tone (Polite, Professional, Firm, Strict), Message Preview. Action: 'Approve & Send' button with confirmation.

login_background.description: Minimalist abstract architecture image for login screen right panel.

critical_rules: Use Indian Rupees (₹) formatted as en-IN (e.g., ₹1,50,000.00) everywhere.
ALL interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='add-customer-btn').
Use lucide-react for all icons (Dashboard, Users, Box, FileText, CheckCircle).
Reminder tones map: Day -2 -> Polite, Day 0 -> Professional, Day +5 -> Firm, Day +10 -> Strict.
Never auto-send emails. They MUST sit in the Approval Queue.
